name: Bug report
about: Something in the stack doesn't work as documented
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug

---

## What you tried

A clear, specific description. Include the command or workflow you ran.

## What you expected

What the README, workflow, or case study said would happen.

## What actually happened

The actual behavior. Include error output if any.

## Environment

- OS:
- Claude Code version (`claude --version`):
- Node version (if relevant):
- Python version (if relevant):
- Marketplaces installed:

## Reproducibility

- [ ] Reproduces every time
- [ ] Reproduces sometimes
- [ ] Reproduced once, can't repeat

## Notes

Any extra context — links to logs, screenshots, related issues.
